allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c=fs.readFileSync\('src/assets/tailwind.css','utf8'\); console.log\('pinpad occurrences:', \(c.match\(/pinpad/g\)||[]\).length\); console.log\('pin-user occurrences:', \(c.match\(/pin-user/g\)||[]\).length\); console.log\('file length:', c.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c=fs.readFileSync\('src/assets/tailwind.css','utf8'\); const idx=c.lastIndexOf\('auth-screen'\); const last2k=c.slice\(idx\); const pinpadIdx=c.indexOf\('pinpad-wrapper'\); console.log\('auth-screen at:', idx, '| pinpad-wrapper at:', pinpadIdx, '| auth-screen comes before pinpad:', idx < pinpadIdx\);")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('version:', p.version\); console.log\('name:', p.name\); console.log\('scripts:', JSON.stringify\(p.scripts,null,2\)\); console.log\('build config:', JSON.stringify\(p.build||{},null,2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const {execSync} = require\('child_process'\); try { const r = execSync\('npm run build', {encoding:'utf8', timeout:90000}\); console.log\(r.slice\(-500\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(e.stdout?.slice\(-1000\)\); console.log\('STDERR:', e.stderr?.slice\(-1000\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const {execSync}=require\('child_process'\); try{const r=execSync\('npm run build',{encoding:'utf8',timeout:90000}\); const last=r.split\('\\n'\).filter\(Boolean\).slice\(-3\).join\('\\n'\); console.log\(last\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('FAIL'\); console.log\(e.stdout?.split\('\\n'\).filter\(l=>l.includes\('error'\)||l.includes\('Error'\)||l.includes\('built'\)\).slice\(-5\).join\('\\n'\)\);}")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const deps = {...p.dependencies, ...p.devDependencies}; const icons = Object.keys\(deps\).filter\(k => k.includes\('icon'\) || k.includes\('lucide'\) || k.includes\('feather'\) || k.includes\('heroicon'\) || k.includes\('react-icons'\)\); console.log\(icons.map\(k => k + ': ' + deps[k]\).join\('\\n'\)\);")
